rationale: C20 next_cycle_plan called for bug hunt C20 + HubAntre visual refresh. Bug hunt C20: verified JourneyMapDisplay.gd — _process() frame cost acceptable (max 12 visible nodes, ~360 scanline iterations), _classify_event handles both String and Dict effect formats correctly, _draw_scroll_indicator identical glyphs for top/bottom is cosmetic not a bug, no critical/high bugs found. Feature: HubAntre visual refresh — the hub screen lacked critical gameplay information (faction reputation, Anam, Oghams). Added two CRT-styled panels: (1) status panel showing Anam currency + Rune unlock count, (2) faction reputation panel with 5 color-coded progress bars using faction_* CRT_PALETTE colors, numeric values, and tier labels from MerlinReputationSystem.get_tier_label(). Both panels fade in during entry animation. Responsive layout with safe area margins.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C21 (verify faction panel renders correctly with edge case values: all factions at 0, all at 100, mixed high/low). Then feature: Memoires panel redesign — the existing _show_memoires_panel() and _show_journal_panel() are basic VBoxContainer popups. Redesign them with CRT terminal aesthetic matching the new faction panel: styled scrollable lists, faction color coding in journal entries, terminal boot animation on panel open.
